utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these categories. Each one is specified with details and associated costs (either explicit numeric values or clearly stated as 'included in €950 comprehensive plan'), and the total_budget provides both monthly and annual breakdowns. All required details are present and fully specified according to the format requirements.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists 'PrimeCare Premium Plan2' for physical health, which corresponds closely to 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' in the ground-truth ratings (rating 10). For mental health, the description matches 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' under mental health coverage (rating 10). The property coverage refers to 'Luxury items coverage, art coverage, electronics coverage, business equipment protection,' which aligns with 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' (rating 10). The travel coverage includes 'Executive business travel protection, medical evacuation, emergency coordination, global assistance,' matching 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10). The additional services include '24/7 customer support, dedicated agent, priority claims processing, emergency coordination, telemedicine, wellness programs,' which correspond to enhancement services 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 10), 'Wellness Programs' (rating 10), and '24/7 Travel Assistance' (rating 10). Thus, all selected items are mapped accordingly.
